entries.title: Deku Enters The Main Fight Before He Is Ready For Its Scale

context.label: Deku and Bakugo draw Shigaraki away

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Deku joins the Shigaraki battle with new abilities and urgency, but he is not emotionally or technically prepared for the war’s scale.
content.injection: Write Deku as brave and overextended. His body, judgment, and emotions are under more strain than his training prepared him for.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia

context.label: Deku and Bakugo draw Shigaraki away

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Bakugo recognizes that Deku tends to destroy himself for victory and becomes increasingly alert to that danger during the Shigaraki fight.
content.injection: Use Bakugo’s perspective as tactical and personal: he knows Deku’s self-sacrificial pattern and watches for it.

entries.title: Float Changes Deku’s Mobility But Not His Maturity

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Deku’s use of Float gives him new aerial control during the Shigaraki battle, but it does not make him calm, experienced, or fully balanced.
content.injection: After Float activates, Deku can keep people airborne and maneuver vertically, but he can still panic, rage, and overuse his body.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia
sourceInfo.notes: Draft Saga Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

ability.name: Float
constraints: Float adds aerial mobility but does not replace training or emotional control.
antiLore: Do not treat Float as full flight mastery immediately.

entries.title: Blackwhip Becomes Rescue Rigging In The Air

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Deku uses Blackwhip with Float to suspend and move allies during the Shigaraki battle.
content.injection: Use Blackwhip here as restraint, rescue rigging, and emergency positioning, not only as an attack tendril.

entries.title: Deku Rage After Bakugo Injury Risks Losing Tactical Judgment

context.label: Bakugo takes a hit meant for Deku

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Bakugo’s injury pushes Deku into rage, making him more aggressive and less tactically balanced against Shigaraki and All For One influence.
content.injection: After Bakugo is hit, Deku’s anger should affect his choices. Do not keep him perfectly composed.

entries.title: Bakugo Rising Is Protective Instinct Not Instant Redemption

context.label: Bakugo takes a hit meant for Deku

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Bakugo’s protective action for Deku is a major growth marker, but it does not erase their past or complete his emotional arc by itself.
content.injection: Write Bakugo’s save as significant but not magically absolving. It shows change under pressure, not a finished apology arc.

entries.title: All For One Influence Competes With Shigaraki’s Will

context.label: All For One influence pressures Shigaraki from within

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Inside the battle, All For One’s influence pressures Shigaraki’s body and will, complicating whether Shigaraki acts entirely as himself.
content.injection: When AFO influence appears, write Shigaraki as contested rather than replaced cleanly. His hatred and AFO’s agenda overlap but are not identical.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia

entries.title: One For All Vestiges Are Active But Not Public Knowledge

context.label: Deku confronts One For All vestiges in hospital state

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: The One For All vestiges become more directly involved in guiding Deku, but this remains hidden from nearly everyone outside OFA’s circle.
content.injection: Do not let classmates or the public know about OFA vestiges unless the Context is a private OFA scene or later explicit reveal.

entries.title: Danger Sense Should Not Appear Before Its Context

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Danger Sense is not an all-purpose early warning system for Deku before the story reaches the relevant OFA progression.
content.injection: Before Danger Sense activation/recognition, do not give Deku clean danger radar simply because later arcs use that Quirk.

entries.title: Shigaraki Is Not Fully All For One Yet

context.label: All For One influence pressures Shigaraki from within

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: During this arc, Shigaraki is under All For One pressure but has not become the final-war personality state.
content.injection: Do not import Final War possession-state conclusions into this battle. Preserve the unstable war-stage conflict between Shigaraki and AFO.

entries.title: Endeavor Prominence Burn Moment Is Desperate Containment

context.label: All For One influence pressures Shigaraki from within

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Endeavor’s high-output attack against Shigaraki is a desperate attempt to end a battle that normal restraint cannot contain.
content.injection: When Endeavor uses maximum firepower here, frame it as last-resort containment, not casual overkill.

entries.title: Heroes Cannot Publicly Explain One For All Targeting

context.label: Deku and Bakugo draw Shigaraki away

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Because One For All remains secret, heroes cannot easily explain why Shigaraki is fixating on Deku.
content.injection: In mixed-hero scenes, keep OFA targeting difficult to discuss. Characters can notice Shigaraki wants Deku without knowing why.

entries.title: Shigaraki Physical Strength Persists Even Under Erasure

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Even while Quirks are suppressed, Shigaraki’s enhanced body remains physically dangerous.
content.injection: Do not make Erasure reduce Shigaraki to normal human strength. His body enhancement remains a threat.

entries.title: Deku Overuse Damages His Body Again During War

context.label: Bakugo takes a hit meant for Deku

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Deku’s repeated high-output attacks in the war push his arms and body back into severe overuse risk.
content.injection: In PLW combat, keep Deku’s power use costly. He cannot spam maximum output without physical consequences.
